documentation:
## Aliyun ROS VOD Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as VOD from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-vod';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.datasource.EditingProjects.attr_editing_project_ids

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.datasource.EditingProjects.attr_editing_projects
documentation: Attribute EditingProjects: The list of editing projects.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::VOD::EditingProjects`, which is used to query the basic information about online editing projects.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosEditingProjects\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-vod-editingprojects>

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.datasource.EditingProjectsProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `EditingProjects`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-vod-editingprojects>

```
param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

param title

Property title: The title of the online editing project.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.datasource.EditingProjectsProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

documentation: Property title: The title of the online editing project.

modules.name: ros_cdk_vod
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS VOD Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as VOD from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-vod';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject.attr_create_time
documentation:
Attribute CreateTime: The time when the online editing project was created.

The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject.attr_editing_project_id
documentation: Attribute EditingProjectId: The ID of the online editing project.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject.attr_editing_project_name
documentation: Attribute EditingProjectName: The name of the online editing project.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject.attr_modified_time
documentation:
Attribute ModifiedTime: The last time when the online editing project was modified.

The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject.attr_timeline
documentation: Attribute Timeline: The timeline of the online editing project.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProject.attr_title
documentation: Attribute Title: The title of the online editing project.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::VOD::EditingProject`, which is used to create an online editing project.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosEditingProject\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-vod-editingproject>

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProjectProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `EditingProject`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-vod-editingproject>

```
param title

Property title: The title of the online editing project.

param editing_project_name

Property editingProjectName: The name of the online editing project.

param timeline

Property timeline: The timeline of the online editing project, in JSON format. If you do not specify this parameter, an empty timeline is created and the duration of the online editing project is zero.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProjectProps.title
documentation: Property title: The title of the online editing project.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProjectProps.editing_project_name
documentation: Property editingProjectName: The name of the online editing project.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.EditingProjectProps.timeline
documentation:
Property timeline: The timeline of the online editing project, in JSON format.

If you do not specify this parameter, an empty timeline is created and the duration of the online editing project is zero.

classes.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallback

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallback.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::VOD::MessageCallback`, which is used to configure the callback method, callback URL, and event types for an event notification.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosMessageCallback\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-vod-messagecallback>

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `MessageCallback`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-vod-messagecallback>

```
param callback_type

Property callbackType: Callback method.

param app_id

Property appId: App ID. If it is not passed, it is the ID of the default application of the system, with a fixed value: app-1000000.

param auth_key

Property authKey: Authentication Key, up to 32 characters, must contain both uppercase and lowercase letters and numbers. This parameter can be set when the callback method is HTTP.

param auth_switch

Property authSwitch: The authentication switch of the HTTP callback, this parameter is valid when the callback method is set to HTTP.

param callback_url

Property callbackUrl: Callback address. When the callback method is HTTP, this parameter needs to be set. The length of the callback address URL cannot exceed 256 bytes, and setting multiple callback addresses is not supported.

param event_type_list

Property eventTypeList: Callback event type. When the value is empty, all message notifications are turned off, and when the value is ALL, all message notifications are turned on. You can also specify to enable certain message notifications, and use a comma (,) to separate multiple event types.

param mns_endpoint

Property mnsEndpoint: This parameter needs to be set when the callback method is MNS for the message queue public network endpoint. You can log in to the message service console and click the Get Endpoint button in the upper right corner to get it.

param mns_queue_name

Property mnsQueueName: The name of the message queue, which can be viewed in the queue list by logging in to the message service console. When the callback method is MNS, this parameter needs to be set.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.app_id
documentation:
Property appId: App ID.

If it is not passed, it is the ID of the default
application of the system, with a fixed value: app-1000000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.auth_key
documentation:
Property authKey: Authentication Key, up to 32 characters, must contain both uppercase  and lowercase letters and numbers.

This parameter can be set when the callback method is HTTP.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.auth_switch
documentation: Property authSwitch: The authentication switch of the HTTP callback,  this parameter is valid when the callback method is set to HTTP.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.callback_url
documentation:
Property callbackUrl: Callback address.

When the callback method is HTTP,
this parameter needs to be set. The length of the callback address
URL cannot exceed 256 bytes, and setting multiple callback addresses is not supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.event_type_list
documentation:
Property eventTypeList: Callback event type.

When the value is empty, all message notifications are turned off,
and when the value is ALL, all message notifications are turned on.
You can also specify to enable certain message notifications,
and use a comma (,) to separate multiple event types.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.mns_endpoint
documentation:
Property mnsEndpoint: This parameter needs to be set when the callback method is MNS for the  message queue public network endpoint.

You can log in to the message service
console and click the Get Endpoint button in the upper right corner to get it.

methods.name: ros_cdk_vod.MessageCallbackProps.mns_queue_name
documentation:
Property mnsQueueName: The name of the message queue, which can be viewed in the queue  list by logging in to the message service console.

When the callback method is MNS, this parameter needs to be set.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::VOD::EditingProject`, which is used to create an online editing project.

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `EditingProject` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
